panels.alt: A reader is frustrated because a static proposal only works on one screen and becomes too small elsewhere
panels.caption: Old documents are static and hard to use everywhere.

panels.alt: PRD adapts across devices while keeping interactive charts, comments, media, and offline sync available
panels.caption: PRD is more than just resizing.

panels.alt: One PRD travels across phone, desktop, collaboration, live update, and offline reading contexts
panels.caption: One PRD can be portable, responsive, collaborative, and rich.
